fair_play_policy.description: Use fair items for primary recognition comparisons and withheld-evidence items as controls.
fair_play_policy.name: admit_fair_play_keep_controls_separate

scoring_policy.description: Collect one canonical G row per subject, condition, phase, story, and target claim.
scoring_policy.name: canonical_g_rows

temporal_policy.description: Use annotation timesteps for contradiction availability, reveal point, and recognition lag.
temporal_policy.name: narrative_timestep_recognition_lag

treatments.description: Reader sees the story text without Epistemap graph sidecars.
Reader sees the story text plus Epistemap graph context without the answer key.
